topic: MSFT EPS trajectory and FQ2 FY2026 forecast
summary: Microsoft quarterly EPS has grown from $3.23 (FQ2 FY25) to $3.72 (FQ1 FY26) over 4 quarters. QoQ growth is decelerating (7.1% → 5.5% → 1.9%). Five forecast methods for FQ2 FY2026 (Oct-Dec 2025) yield a range of $3.72-$3.93 with mean $3.86 and median $3.90. Operating margin expanding strongly from 45.5% to 48.9%.
content: MSFT quarterly EPS: FQ2 FY25=$3.23, FQ3 FY25=$3.46, FQ4 FY25=$3.65, FQ1 FY26=$3.72. TTM EPS=$14.06. Revenue growing from $69.6B to $77.7B. Operating margin expanded from 45.5% to 48.9%. QoQ EPS growth decelerating: 7.12%, 5.49%, 1.92%. Five forecast methods for FQ2 FY2026: Linear=$3.93, AvgQoQ=$3.90, YoY=$3.90, WeightedQoQ=$3.87, Deceleration=$3.72. Mean=$3.86, Median=$3.90. Stock at $479.28, TTM P/E=34.1x.
